title: ARMM
description: A mod that primarily focuses on gear and dimensions.
body:
A mod that adds OP stuff and "Regular stuff". It adds toys for creative mod players and items for serious players of survival.

 

This mod adds dimensions that can only be accessed by doing very specific things, such as going to a certain Y level with a certain item in your hand. 

 

There are also several weapons that are absolutely broken in terms of power, but some of them can't be crafted and others are very expensive. Enjoy.
